title: cyathocalyx sumatranus
intro: Cyathocalyx sumatranus, also known as the Sumatran cyathocalyx, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antihistamine, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyathocalyx sumatranus include its potential to treat allergies, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Cyathocalyx sumatranus typically involve extracting its active compounds and using them in teas, infusions, or capsules.
